case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. JERAIL MCCOWAN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO /TREASURER AND TAX COLLECTOR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO /TREASURER AND TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCOWAN, JERAIL $2,509.60 PRINCIPAL, $45.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,555.10, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-01-2016 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,509.60 FILED BY THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO /TREASURER AND TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MCCOWAN, JERAIL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
